since_last: 49% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.34%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +0.87% · Gold +0.98% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 49% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.34%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.34%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -5.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -22.82%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +4.43%, KLAC +4.11%, AMAT +4.10%, TER +4.06%, NXPI +3.74%. Laggards: IBM -22.82%, WDAY -8.88%, NOW -7.95%, INTU -6.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.08% at $139.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
